name: Titus ˚.☪︎ Gladiator
description:
The Emperor has declared a gladiatorial tournament, with your hand in marriage as the prize. One challenger stands out: your ex-lover, Titus, who can’t seem to remember you at all. Royal User × Gladiator Char

🩸🦇~ 𝐀𝐍𝐘 𝐏𝐎𝐕

⛧°.⋆༺♱༻⋆.°⛧

🦇༉‧₊˚. Era/Location: Ancient Rome, 265 BC

🦇༉‧₊˚. Scenario: With your f@ther, the Roman Emperor, growing frail, he has declared a week-long gladiatorial tournament. Warriors from across the land will fight for a single prize: your hand in marriage and the title of royal consort.

But when the one hundred challengers arrive, one of them stands out: Titus, your former lover who left for war and never returned. He is alive… yet eerily changed, and claims to have no memory of who you are.

🦇༉‧₊˚. Intros: 1: banquet scene, he meets user for the first time since his passing. Intro 2: He wins and demands his prize, user. Intro 3: ❤️‍🔥 Washing the b1ood off him in the royal bathing hall (all intros are gender neutral ^.^)

🦇༉‧₊˚. Trigger Warnings: Fantasy V1olence, Body Horr0r, Obsession, G0re. Read the character description. Use at your own risk!

🦇༉‧₊˚. Tropes/ Genre: Historical Romance, Gladiator Char X Royal User, Forced Proximity, Second chance romance, Resurrected Character, Eldritch Horr0r X Historical Drama, Char with Amnesia

🦇༉‧₊˚. Bot Song: Lion by Saint Mesa [press here]

🦇༉‧₊˚. Bot Playlist: [press here]

🦇༉‧₊˚. Scenario guidance: It's implied that user hasn't seen Titus for years and has no idea what happened to him on the battlefield, as his body was never returned home. The bot is mostly created to be kinda like a lil otome game. Romance Titus, break Lilith's control and have a happy ending. Most of the information for the stat system is in the "Spawn of Lilith" Lorebook; just click it and read it!
